intent.objective: Complete Production Readiness Review before zenovell.com release while keeping beta.zenovell.com as Production Candidate.
intent.strategy: Analytics Integration is COMPLETE. Do not change application analytics or GTM unless a defect is proven. Advance UI/UX freeze, SEO, Search Console, Ads prep, smoke tests; run QA-001 CTA Surface Regression after UI/UX Freeze; only then authorize domain switch.
intent.risk_acknowledgement: Low for analytics infrastructure (published GTM v2 + live Realtime). Residual risk is incomplete UI freeze and deferred full CTA surface retest (QA-001).

stop_conditions: application source change without proven defect
GTM/GA4 change without proven defect and Owner authorization
production switch to zenovell.com without Production Gate + QA-001
system.rollback_plan: Documentation/state-only revert. Application and published GTM v2 remain as last verified live configuration.

current_phase: Production Readiness Review before zenovell.com release
next_safe_action: Begin Production Readiness Review: prioritize UI/UX freeze and SEO/Search Console/Ads prep; schedule QA-001 after UI/UX Freeze.
